title: Kissht gets Amfi registration to enter mutual fund distribution
summary: Kissht parent OnEMI Technology Solutions said Invincible Minds received an Amfi Registration Number on July 14. The registration is valid from July 13, 2026, to July 12, 2029. It allows the subsidiary to distribute mutual fund products, but not to launch or manage mutual fund schemes.

title: Indian spacetech industry shoots for the stars
